subject: Social Science
overall_learning_objectives: Understand the challenges faced by women in the past
Learn about women who brought social change
Recognize the importance of education and equal opportunities
Understand the concept of gender equality
Develop observation, reflection, and storytelling skills

lesson_plan.title: Introduction to Women’s Roles
topics_covered: Past roles of women in society
teaching_strategy: Ask simple questions to engage students
student_activities: Share what they know about women in history
Discuss why women’s roles were limited in the past

lesson_plan.title: Education and Opportunities
teaching_strategy: Show pictures of women scholars and leaders
Explain historical context in simple terms
student_activities: List ways education helped women achieve change
Discuss differences between past and present opportunities

lesson_plan.title: Women Who Changed Society
topics_covered: Examples of women leaders and reformers (Ramabai, Rokeya, Rashsundari Devi)
teaching_strategy: Show short video clips if available
student_activities: Draw a picture of one women leader
Write one sentence about her contribution

lesson_plan.title: Breaking Gender Stereotypes
topics_covered: Common stereotypes about men and women
How some women broke these stereotypes
teaching_strategy: Ask students to give examples from daily life
student_activities: Identify stereotypes in school or media

lesson_plan.title: Women Today and Equality
topics_covered: Equal participation in school, work, and community
Simple discussion on rights and responsibilities
teaching_strategy: Class discussion connecting past and present
Show pictures of women in different professions
student_activities: List women professions and roles in society today

lesson_plan.title: Revision and Fun Quiz
topics_covered: Recap of women leaders, education, and equality
Relate past struggles to students’ own observations
teaching_strategy: Fun quiz with pictures and multiple choice
Class discussion connecting to current society
student_activities: Share one new thing they learned about women’s contributions

teaching_aids: Pictures of women leaders and reformers
teacher_tip: Use stories, pictures, and examples to make the lesson interactive. Encourage students to share observations and reflect on gender equality in their lives.
